limitations: Owner-supplied private repository signals are included and are not independently verifiable from public GitHub.
Employer work, code review outside GitHub, and design work are not inferred.
Raw commit counts, contribution streaks, follower counts, and language percentages are not scored directly.
Private-local cards use the same file, release, maintenance, and stewardship dimensions as public-only cards.
Repositories are filtered to activity within the last 180 days.
Live GitHub issue, pull request, and external contributor aggregates are deferred in this version.
Only the highest-signal 12 eligible repositories are summarized in this card.

gaps.whyItMatters: Tests, automation, and change history improve maintenance confidence.
Completeness signals help other people understand, run, and reuse the project.
Shipping signals show the project is usable, not just browsable.
Usability signals help someone run, try, and understand the project quickly.
Stewardship signals show the project has clear ownership and care paths.

limitations: Owner-supplied private repository signals are included and are not independently verifiable from public GitHub.
These are improvement hints, not a developer ranking.
Employer work and non-GitHub maintenance are not inferred.
